description.ko: 생체 발광 막과 황금빛 수액을 통해 생명의 리듬감 있는 호흡과 유기적인 흐름을 보여주는 심해 생물학적 구조물입니다.
description.en: A deep-sea biological structure showcasing the rhythmic breathing and organic flow of life through bioluminescent membranes and golden sap.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Peristaltic Bloom.' A massive, central respiratory organ made of semi-transparent #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular networks. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid, rhythmically pulsing with internal bioluminescence. Golden #FFE66D liquid light flows through intricate capillary channels like molten honey. Macro focus on the cellular, semi-permeable textures and the exhaled ribbons of bioluminescent mist that drift like liquid silk. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh.
